rag_rules: Guarantee statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
Implementation-level bindings should be moved to implementation annexes
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reside in component type annexes; implementation bindings go in implementation annexes
Validator diagnostics pointing to implementation scope in type annexes indicate incorrect guarantee placement
Only visible AADL features or declared helpers should be referenced in AGREE contracts
Generated AGREE code must not introduce unresolved identifiers or invalid scalar types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type contracts may only reference visible ports and features
Use `int`, `real`, and `bool` for scalar type declarations in AGREE
anti_patterns: Placing guarantee statements in component implementation annexes instead of component type annexes
Referencing implementation-level subcomponent paths in component type contracts
